discussion.p: added a `std::formatter` specialization for `error_code`, but without a feature test macro. During the review of the pull request to apply the paper to the working draft there were requests for a feature test macro.

blockquote.pre: #define __cpp_lib_format 202603L // also in <format> #define __cpp_lib_format_error_code 202606L // also in <system_error> #define __cpp_lib_format_path 202506L // also in <filesystem>
